properties.name: Neo4j Graph Database
properties.description: Per-project Neo4j instance accessed via Bolt (neo4j-driver). Used by renderers to read graph nodes and by NaCl skills (sync/analyze) to write graph mutations. Connection details (bolt port, credentials) resolved from project config.yaml. Runs in Docker via graph-infra/docker-compose.yml.

properties.name: Local Claude CLI
properties.description: The `claude` binary installed on the analyst machine. Invoked exclusively via the itsalt-pinch Pacer singleton for skill prompts (/nacl-ba-sync, /nacl-ba-analyze). Never spawned directly. Runs with --print --output-format=stream-json --permission-mode=bypassPermissions.

properties.name: Local Filesystem
properties.description: Board files (.excalidraw), meta sidecars (.meta.json), snapshots, and rendered markdown files stored under each project boards_dir (graph-infra/boards/). Watched by chokidar (fs-watcher service) for real-time change events broadcast over WebSocket.

properties.name: Project Registry
properties.description: JSON file at ~/.nacl/projects.json (or $NACL_HOME/projects.json). Single source of truth for registered projects (id, name, root path, activeProjectId). Read on startup, written on project switch. Also watched by registry-watcher service to surface external edits (e.g. from nacl-init) over WebSocket.

properties.name: Excalidraw npm Library
properties.description: The @excalidraw/excalidraw React component embedded in the web workspace. Provides the full canvas editor in-browser. Board JSON produced by the editor is saved back to the filesystem via the Fastify /api/v1/boards API. This is the npm package — NOT the public excalidraw.com cloud.

properties.name: Docker (graph-infra)
properties.description: Docker Compose stack under graph-infra/ that runs the per-project Neo4j container. The analyst-tool itself does not manage Docker; the analyst starts it separately with `docker compose up -d`. The tool reads graph.neo4j_bolt_port from config.yaml to connect.

properties.name: itsalt-pinch (Pacer)
properties.description: npm package itsalt-pinch providing the Pacer concurrency wrapper. Enforces working-window scheduling and global concurrency invariants for claude -p subprocess calls. One singleton Pacer per server process. Emits lifecycle hooks (onEnqueued, onStarted, onBlocked, onFinished) that are broadcast over WebSocket.
